name: Grande Réserve Brut, Champagne Jean de Villaré, Champagne, France
notes: An elegant and pure champagne, succulent notes of apple, peach and apricot and lovely length on the finish.

name: Prosecco DOC, Spumante, La Vita Sociale, Veneto, Italy
notes: Crisp and delicious with plenty of aromatic apple and pear flavours.

name: Albariño, El Camarón, Galicia, Spain
notes: Capturing the purity of Albariño, with citrus, minerality and saline notes throughout. The palate is light and fresh.

name: Pinot Grigio, Terre d'Abruzzo IGT, Bella Modella, Abruzzo, Italy
notes: A beautifully light, vibrant white to be appreciated for its zesty, citrus character and refreshing acidity.

name: Sauvignon Blanc, IGP Pays d'Oc, Orée Sauvage, Languedoc, France
notes: A rich, textured white that carries a long and vibrant mineral dry finish.

name: Chardonnay, Central Valley, Costa Vera, Indómita, Central Valley, Chile
notes: Golden, delicious creamy texture, creamy tropical fruit, banana pineapple with a zingy lemon finish.

name: Chenin Blanc-Viognier, Lo & Behold, Piekenierskloof, South Africa
notes: Citrus, pear, peach and ripe tropical fruit characteristics envelop the palate through to the finish.

name: Chablis, Domaine Besson, Burgundy, France
notes: Crisp green apple, citrus zest, white flowers, and subtle flinty notes reminiscent of wet stone and chalk

name: Rosé, Vin de France, Le Pic, Terres Fidèles, Languedoc, France
notes: Pale, fresh rosé full of strawberry and grapefruit zest—light, bright and summer‑ready.

name: Palm Par L'Escarelle, IGP Méditerranée, Château L’ Escarelle, Provence, France
notes: Summer fruits, blackcurrant, raspberry on the nose, with a lively attack and fresh redcurrant notes on the palate.

name: Château Treytins, Bordeaux, France
notes: Well developed on the nose with red fresh fruit, mouthfilling with elegant delicate tannins.

name: Malbec, Mendoza, Santuario, Mendoza, Argentina
notes: Plum, blueberry and blackcurrant with plenty of complexity and a harmonious finish.

name: The Wrong Un Shiraz, Cabernet, One Chain Vineyards, South Australia, Australia
notes: A rich, well balanced example of the Aussie classic blend. Lush black fruits with touches of woodspice and cassis.

name: Merlot, Central Valley, Costa Vera, Indómita, Central Valley, Chile
notes: Soft, super juicy, ripe plummy fruit with a long full flavoured finish.

name: Magnífico Tempranillo, Luis Marin, Aragón, Spain
notes: Attractive strawberry fruit, subtly enhanced with notes of plum, fresh fig and with a lingering purity on the finish.

name: Baccio, Chianti Riserva, DOCG, Le Chiantigiane, Tuscany, Italy
notes: Fruity, floral taste with hints of morello cherry and violet and a slight hint of vanilla, dry, well-balanced palate.
